question: [File: 'File Name: rest/transactions.js -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getTransactionTimestamps()] Can an unprivileged external user supply a timestamp filter with multiple eq values (timestampRange.eqValues.length > 1) to trigger the early return of {rows: []} and then use the absence of results to perform a timing oracle attack, inferring whether a specific timestamp corresponds to a multi-signer approved transaction?
